data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control for the signed waiver, specifically identifying which version was signed when. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or mechanisms that confirm the existence of version control for the waiver. The linked use case mentions the need for version control, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of version control for the signed waiver.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
